title: rosa gallica var. ruralis
intro: Rosa gallica var. ruralis, also known as the French rural rose, is a variety of the Rosa gallica species, which is a type of fragrant, old garden rose. The plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rosa gallica var. ruralis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to address various health concerns, such as digestive issues and skin irritations.
